title: Get Account Financials Request
description: Request financial status for an operator-billed account. Returns spend summary, credit/balance status, and invoice history. Only applicable when the seller declares account_financials capability.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

account.description: Account to query financials for. Must be an operator-billed account.

period.description: Date range for the spend summary. Defaults to the current billing cycle if omitted.

examples.description: Query by account ID for current billing cycle
Query by natural key for a specific period
Agency querying financials for a client account
